)

    for name in ("joint_bilateral", "asymmetric_bilateral"):
        out = REGISTRY[name](delta, orig, full_size)
        err = (out - 0.1).abs().max().item()
        assert err < 1e-5, f"{name} failed constant-delta + textured-guide: max err {err:.2e}"
def test_sr_maxine_at_min_resolution():
    """Maxine VSR requires inputs >= 90x90. Test at a larger synthetic size."""
    pytest.importorskip("nvvfx")
    torch.manual_seed(0)
    delta = torch.randn(1, 3, 108, 192, device="cuda", dtype=torch.float32) * 0.05
    orig = torch.rand(1, 3, 216, 384, device="cuda", dtype=torch.float32)
    full_size = (216, 384)
    out = REGISTRY["sr_maxine"](delta, orig, full_size)
    assert out.shape == (1, 3, 216, 384)
    assert out.dtype == torch.float32
    assert out.device.type == "cuda"
    assert torch.isfinite(out).all()
    assert out.abs().max() < 1.0
